description_long: This is a vertically oriented, rectangular envelope made of glossy paper or light cardstock, featuring a full-color printed design. The front displays a scenic landscape with rolling hills and a cloudy sky, overlaid with the 'cercle energie' logo and branding. The back side contains a large image of a woman sitting on a couch, surrounded by informational text and logos of various partner organizations. The interior flaps are printed with additional instructions and checklists, suggesting it is used for official or promotional correspondence. The envelope appears to be a presentation or document envelope, likely used for distributing informational packets or marketing materials. There are no visible address markings, postage stamps, or security features such as tamper-evident seals.
description: A glossy, printed presentation envelope with scenic and branded graphics, used for official or promotional documents. It features detailed text and logos on the back and interior flaps.
description_view_0: The back of the envelope shows a landscape image with contact information printed at the bottom.
description_view_1: The front displays the 'cercle energie' logo over a scenic background, with no address or postage markings.
description_view_2: The envelope is partially open, revealing interior flaps with printed checklists and instructions.
description_view_3: The reverse side features a large image of a woman, informational text, and multiple partner logos.
attribute_address_markings: ZAC du Cornillon Nord Porte E-CS 60003 93216 Saint-Denis CEDEX www.cercle-energie.com 01 73 60 60 19 (printed contact info, not a recipient address)
